rationale: Layer 4 (git log --all -p historical audit) carries a single hit from a vestigial test fixture in pre-v2 commit history. The hit is documented and accepted; the gate is `<= baseline` to allow the known state without permitting NEW historical leaks. Reduce to 0 if the historical commit is ever rewritten or filtered.
current_tree_rationale: Layers 1-3 are strict zero. Any leak in current-tree state fails CI. EXCLUDE_RE handles legitimate-by-design references in tests/grep-audit.sh — extend EXCLUDE_RE rather than bumping this baseline.
review_cadence: Every minor release (v2.x.0) — confirm Layer 4 baseline still reflects intended state.
